title: Mildly Smoky Egyptian Plum Tomatoes Grill
description: A fresh and velvety Egyptian dish featuring grilled plum tomatoes, perfect for a sick day, and low in sodium. This recipe is a delicious and healthy option for a light meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium heat, about 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the plum tomatoes in half and brush with olive oil.
Sprinkle smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper over the tomatoes.
Grill the tomatoes for 10 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly charred.
Remove the tomatoes from the grill and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Squeeze lemon juice over the tomatoes and serve immediately.
Serve the tomatoes with crusty bread or over rice for a filling meal.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
